_note: mega-helper (failure by excess: kitchen-sink + API-wrapper MCP).
_provenance: RE-SOURCED from real council transcripts (I-13 deeper fix, 0.2.43): each phrasing below is a wording the council ACTUALLY produced in runs/2026-06-04-mega-helper-baseline.md / 2026-06-10-mega-helper-run2.md / run3.md — lightly trimmed, not author-invented. So a green check-recall now means 'the checker's patterns still catch wordings the council really used' (a measurement) rather than 'the patterns match the author's paraphrase of its own patterns' (the closed loop Andrej K. + Chip H. flagged). Re-sourcing the remaining corpora the same way is tracked in I-13.

P3 kitchen-sink (four unrelated domains: kitchen-sink bundle with no shared job
four unrelated domains in one plugin (PDF tooling, brand strategy, recipe search, deployment)
four unrelated jobs in one bundle — four products with commas between them
textbook kitchen sink; the partition is trivial
P2 API-wrapper MCP (1:1 REST endpoints): a textbook API-wrapper anti-pattern, conceded in the file's own comments
25 endpoint-shaped tools, each a direct passthrough to the REST endpoint
a 1:1 wrapper over REST endpoints (24 CRUD tools)
1:1 verb-per-route with identical schemas is the definition of wrapping, not curating
